exploit.exploit_path: 文件上传 -> req.files.products.data -> serialize.unserialize (pickle反序列化) -> __reduce__ 执行系统命令
exploit.attack_vector: HTTP POST 文件上传，参数名 products，字段 data 包含恶意pickle序列化对象
exploit.verification_method: 运行PoC脚本后，检查服务器HTTP响应或应用日志中是否包含'AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337'字符串；若目标有回显则直接可见，否则需观察错误信息或服务端行为。
exploit.impact: 远程代码执行（RCE），攻击者可执行任意系统命令，但本PoC仅用于验证，无破坏性。

owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
verification_checks: Confirm untrusted input is passed to a deserialization sink.
Confirm the deserializer can instantiate arbitrary classes or call __reduce__.
Confirm no integrity check (HMAC/signature) protects the serialized blob.
Confirm the deserializer can instantiate arbitrary classes or invoke __reduce__/readObject gadgets.
Prefer a function-level harness that feeds a crafted-but-harmless payload rather than a full RCE chain.
false_positive_signals: Only json.loads / yaml.safe_load is used on the untrusted data.
The serialized data is signed and verified before deserialization.
The input is a trusted, application-generated constant.
Only json.loads or yaml.safe_load is used on the untrusted data.
The serialized blob is signed and verified before deserialization.
remediation: Prefer safe formats (JSON) and safe loaders (yaml.safe_load).
Never deserialize untrusted data with pickle/unserialize/ObjectInputStream.
If unavoidable, sign+verify payloads and restrict allowed classes.
Use safe, data-only formats (JSON) and safe loaders (yaml.safe_load).
If unavoidable, sign and verify payloads (HMAC) and restrict deserialization to an allowlist of classes.

security_knowledge.title: Insecure Deserialization
security_knowledge.summary: Untrusted data is deserialized without validation, allowing object injection or remote code execution.
owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

The serialized data is signed and verified before deserialization.
The input is a trusted, application-generated constant.
remediation: Prefer safe formats (JSON) and safe loaders (yaml.safe_load).
Never deserialize untrusted data with pickle/unserialize/ObjectInputStream.
If unavoidable, sign+verify payloads and restrict allowed classes.

security_knowledge.title: Insecure Deserialization Remediation Guide
security_knowledge.summary: Avoid deserializing untrusted data with unsafe formats; prefer data-only formats and integrity protection.
owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
verification_checks: Confirm the fix replaces the unsafe loader or adds signature verification and class restrictions.
false_positive_signals: Only safe loaders (json.loads, yaml.safe_load) are used on untrusted data.
remediation: Use safe, data-only formats (JSON) and safe loaders (yaml.safe_load).
Never deserialize untrusted data with pickle/unserialize/ObjectInputStream.
If unavoidable, sign and verify payloads (HMAC) and restrict deserialization to an allowlist of classes.

findings.code_snippet: var query = "SELECT name,id FROM Users WHERE login='" + req.body.login + "'";

exploit.exploit_path: HTTP POST /login endpoint -> req.body.login -> string concatenation into SQL query -> db.sequelize.query execution
exploit.exploit_code:
import requests

url = "http://localhost:3000/login"  # replace with actual target
payload = "' OR '1'='1"  # authentication bypass
r = requests.post(url, data={"login": payload, "password": "irrelevant"})
if "Welcome" in r.text or "admin" in r.text:
    print("[+] SQL Injection successful")
else:
    print("[-] Not vulnerable")
exploit.verification_method: Send a POST request with a SQL injection payload in the 'login' field. If the response contains the string 'Welcome' or 'admin' (indicating authentication bypass), the vulnerability is confirmed.
exploit.impact: Authentication bypass and potential data disclosure (user credentials).

verification_checks: Confirm user-controlled input reaches SQL construction or execution.
Confirm the query is built with string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting.
Confirm no prepared statement, parameter binding, or strong type conversion separates data from SQL.
Read the local code window and identify the source variable.
Trace whether the source reaches the SQL sink without parameter binding.
If a local target is running, send benign quote/boolean payloads and look for SQL error or response difference.
If no target exists, record dynamic_verdict=not_executed instead of not_reproduced.
false_positive_signals: The sink uses parameter placeholders with a separate parameter tuple/list.
The value is converted to a strict numeric type before reaching SQL.
The SQL statement is a static literal and user input is not interpolated.
Prepared statement with separate parameter binding is present.
The scanner matched a query template but not an executable sink.
The suspect value is a constant or strictly converted numeric value.
remediation: Use prepared statements or parameterized queries.
Do not concatenate user-controlled strings into SQL.
Run database users with least privilege and avoid detailed SQL errors in responses.
Replace string-built SQL with prepared statements or parameterized queries.
Validate business constraints separately from SQL escaping.
Use least-privilege DB users and avoid exposing detailed database errors.

security_knowledge.title: SQL Injection
security_knowledge.summary: Externally influenced input is used to construct SQL without sufficient separation between data and query structure.

Confirm the query is built with string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting.
Confirm no prepared statement, parameter binding, or strong type conversion separates data from SQL.
false_positive_signals: The sink uses parameter placeholders with a separate parameter tuple/list.
The value is converted to a strict numeric type before reaching SQL.
The SQL statement is a static literal and user input is not interpolated.
remediation: Use prepared statements or parameterized queries.
Do not concatenate user-controlled strings into SQL.
Run database users with least privilege and avoid detailed SQL errors in responses.

security_knowledge.title: SQL Injection Remediation Guide
security_knowledge.summary: Use parameterized query APIs and least-privilege database accounts to prevent SQL injection.
verification_checks: Confirm the rewritten query binds user data through parameters rather than string concatenation.
false_positive_signals: Prepared statements and separate bind variables are already present.
remediation: Replace string-built SQL with prepared statements or parameterized queries.
Validate business constraints separately from SQL escaping.
Use least-privilege DB users and avoid exposing detailed database errors.

exploit.exploit_path: 用户通过HTTP POST请求的address参数传入payload，该参数未经任何过滤直接拼接到exec('ping -c 2 ' + req.body.address)中，导致命令注入
exploit.verification_method: 发送带有注入payload的POST请求到/ping接口，检查响应中是否包含标记字符串AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337

Prefer harness verification that mocks command execution instead of running destructive commands.
Only use harmless local payloads such as echo markers in authorized sandboxes.

The input is selected from a strict allowlist of fixed values.

remediation: Prefer library APIs over shell commands.
Use argument arrays with shell=False.
Apply strict allowlists and run command execution in a sandbox with least privilege.
Prefer language/library APIs over external process execution.
Pass arguments as arrays and keep shell=False.
Use strict allowlists for any remaining user-controlled arguments.

summary.executive_summary: 本次审计对象为 DVNA，来源为 https://github.com/appsecco/dvna，项目主要语言为 JavaScript、Shell，框架识别结果为 Express，共解析 18 个文件、962 行代码。AuditAgentX 的流程先由 RepoParserAgent 建立项目画像，再由 StaticScanAgent 调用静态规则和 SAST 工具产生候选漏洞，AuditAgent 补充语义层面的风险发现，VerifyAgent 独立复核并过滤误报，随后 ExploitAgent/DynamicVerifier 对可验证漏洞生成授权 PoC 并保存运行证据，最后由 SummaryAgent 汇总为本报告。当前共发现 50 条风险，其中 Critical 0 条、High 12 条、Medium 33 条、Low 5 条；静态分析覆盖 50 条，动态验证覆盖 3 条，其中 0 条已复现。主要风险类型集中在 Command Injection(6)、template-explicit-unescape(6)、Server-Side Template Injection(5)、XSS(4)，总体风险评级为 HIGH。
summary.static_summary: 静态分析阶段合并 SAST 工具、硬编码密钥检测和自定义规则结果，共形成 50 条静态风险。主要来源分布为 semgrep(22)、custom-taint(22)、audit_agent(6)。这些结果先作为候选项进入 VerifyAgent，避免仅凭规则命中直接下结论。
summary.dynamic_summary: 动态验证阶段对 3 条漏洞保存了运行证据，其中 0 条具备可复现结果。报告中的 Source、Sink、调用路径、PoC 和 runtime 证据共同构成证据链。
workflow_summary: RepoParserAgent：解析仓库结构、语言、框架、入口文件、依赖与代码规模，为后续审计提供项目画像。
StaticScanAgent：调用 Semgrep、Gitleaks、自定义规则等工具进行静态扫描，产出 SQL 注入、命令注入、路径遍历、硬编码密钥等候选风险。
AuditAgent：基于 LLM 对代码上下文做语义审计，补充传统 SAST 工具可能漏掉的业务逻辑与调用链风险。
VerifyAgent：独立复核候选漏洞，调用本地代码上下文读取、启发式分析和 SAST replay 工具过滤误报。
ExploitAgent / DynamicVerifier：为已确认漏洞生成授权 PoC、触发路径和利用代码，并在本地靶场或授权目标上保存动态验证证据。
SummaryAgent：汇总项目概况、静态/动态结果、证据链和修复优先级，生成执行摘要与修改建议。

remediation_plan.title: 优先修复 Critical/High 漏洞
remediation_plan.detail: 先处理已确认、已复现或处于核心入口路径上的高危问题，修复后重新扫描并保留复测证据。

remediation_plan.title: 按漏洞类型批量治理
remediation_plan.detail: 对 SQL 注入、命令注入、路径遍历等同类问题统一采用参数化查询、白名单校验和安全 API。

remediation_plan.title: 补充动态验证覆盖
remediation_plan.detail: 为高危候选漏洞配置本地靶场或授权 URL，让 ExploitAgent/DynamicVerifier 生成可复现证据。

remediation_plan.title: 纳入持续审计流程
remediation_plan.detail: 将静态扫描、VerifyAgent 复核和报告生成接入提交前或 CI 流程，避免修复后回归。

summary.conclusion: 综合项目规模、漏洞数量、严重等级和验证结果，当前项目处于 HIGH 风险水平。建议先处理已确认的高危/可复现漏洞，再统一治理同类输入校验、权限控制、敏感信息管理和依赖安全问题。
